release_notes: Second tuning pass on animations from picker review. Major changes: (a) WALKING: gait completely rewritten — slower default gait speed (~7 rad/local-t vs the previous 18), smaller swing amplitudes (16°/12° vs 22°/18°), and a new knee-bend term that flexes only on the forward-swinging leg so feet visibly lift. Arms now have a subtle elbow swing and move opposite to the legs. Result: the walks read as 'walking' instead of 'frantic shuffling'. (b) NO ARMS OVER FACE: every pose that previously had both arms at 270° (straight up) now uses a wide V at ±20-30° off vertical, so the arms never visually cross the head/face line. Surprise, Yoga Tree, Yoga Mountain, Sleep yawn, and Sleep stretch-up all updated. (c) NEW WAVE GESTURE: a small handwave is now appended to the end of most animations (Stretches, Juggle, Jumping jacks, Sleep, Dance, Yoga) before the figure walks back behind the button — gives the figure a moment to acknowledge the user. Per-animation: (1) Surprise reduced to single spot, 5s duration, wider V on the hands so the '!' has clear airspace. (2) Newspaper removed from the animation registry entirely — the chair + paper composite didn't read cleanly. (3) Juggling balls now drawn solid instead of outlined. (4) Jumping jacks: arms start at horizontal T-pose (180°/0°) and swing inward+upward to a V (225°/315°), never overlapping the head. (5) Power nap shortened from 14s to 10s. Laying pose now has slightly splayed arms and legs (each at ±8-12° off the body axis) so they're clearly visible instead of collapsing onto the body line. (6) Weights unchanged per user request (already perfect). (7) Dance reduced from three spots to two — removed the third spot's spin (the horizontal-squish trick read as a glitch). Legs on the first dance now stand in a wide stance for stability/style. (8) Cartwheel arms switched from along-body to PERPENDICULAR to body — now they sweep out to the sides through every rotation phase instead of slicing through the head area. (9) Yoga Tree and Mountain poses get arms in a V instead of straight-up. All animations now ≤10s.
